description_long: This is a stylized bird with a large, pale orange beak that is slightly hooked at the tip, giving it a distinctive profile. Its body is predominantly gray with darker gray shading on the wings and a white head, while the underbelly and face are lighter in color. The bird stands upright on two webbed, orange feet, and its tail is short and slightly rounded with a subtle dark tip. The eyes are expressive and forward-facing, set above the beak, contributing to a cartoonish, approachable appearance. The wings are folded against the body, and the overall form is plump and robust, suggesting a seabird adapted to both land and water. The surface appears matte and smooth, with no visible texturing or feather detail.
description: A stylized, plump gray bird with a large orange beak, white head, and webbed orange feet. Its wings are folded, and it has a rounded tail and expressive eyes.
description_view_0: Top-down view showing the broad back, folded wings, and rounded tail, with the beak barely visible.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the large, hooked orange beak, plump body, and webbed feet.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the symmetrical face, expressive eyes, prominent beak, and both feet.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the beak's curve, body shape, and tail outline.
attribute_plumage_pattern: solid gray wings and back, white head and underparts, dark-tipped tail
